tuning: E A D G B E
content:
LONELY NO MORE - ROB THOMAS (ACOUSTIC from iTUNES ORIGINALS)

***************************************************
**  Tabbed by http://twitter.com/bigdougschmidt  **
***************************************************


Intro: x2  (CAPO 5)
Em7+11  (for color, do a pull-on of the A string to the B note)
Am      (for color, do a pull-on from open ADGB strings to the Am chord)
D       (without F# bottom string)
F#/Em+7 (see chord diagram below)


Verse 1:
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
     Now it seems to me, That you know just what to say[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]/[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
     Words are only words, Can you show me something else[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]Am[/ch]
     Can you swear to me, That you’ll always be this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]/[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
     Show me how you feel, More than ever baby[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
 I don’t wanna be lonely no more, I don’t wanna have to pay for this[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
 I don’t want to know the lover at my door, Is just another heartache on my list[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
 I don’t wanna be angry no more, You know I could never stand for this[/tab]

[ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]               
[tab]       [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
 So when you tell me that you love me now for sure, I don’t wanna be lonely anymore[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
 Oooh oh oh, Oooh oh oh, Oh oh, Oooh oh-ooo-oh oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
 Oooh oh oh, Oooh oh oh, Oh oh, Oooh oh-ooo-oh oh[/tab]


Verse 2:
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
    Now it’s hard for me, With my heart still on the mend[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]/[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
    Open up to me, Like you do your girlfriends[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
    And you sing to me, And it’s harmony, Girl what you do to me is everything[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]/[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                        [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
Make me say anything Just to get you back again, Why can’t we just try[/tab]


(Chorus:)


Bridge: (single strum, slow)
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
What if I was good to you, What if you were good to me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
What if I could hold you till I feel you move inside of me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
What if I was paradise, What if we were symphonies[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]/[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7
And what if I gave all my life to find someone to stand beside you[/tab]


(Chorus) (Then end on an) Em.


*****************************************************************************
CHORD DIAGRAMS:

[tab]    [ch]EM7[/ch]+11    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch](no [ch]F#[/ch])    
[ch]G[/ch]/[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]*    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]/Em+7**
E----0---------X---------X---------3---------0---------X---------2-|
A-(0)2---------0---------X---------3---------2---------X---------2-|
D----2------(0)2---------0---------2---------2---------0---------1-|
G----0------(0)2---------2---------0---------0---------2---------0-|
B----3------(0)1---------3---------0---------0---------3---------0-|
E----3---------0---------0---------0---------0---------2---------0-|[/tab]


[tab]*What does [ch]G[/ch]/[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] mean?
It means play a Cmaj7 chord, but also play the G note on the E string also![/tab]

**What does F#/Em+7 mean?
It means play an Em+7 chord, but also play the F# note on the E string also!
